_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for Cobra and villain ARAH characters

data.name: Cobra Commander (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Masked leader in blue military uniform with silver faceplate (hooded version) or chrome battle helmet. Cobra insignia on chest. Commands from rear with gestures and threats
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Trooper (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Generic infantry soldier in dark blue uniform with black webgear and red Cobra insignia on chest. Armed with assault rifle. Full-face helmet with visor
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Officer (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra field officer in dark blue uniform similar to Cobra Trooper but with silver rank insignia. Armed with assault rifle. Full-face helmet with visor
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Destro (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Imposing Scottish arms dealer wearing a chrome beryllium steel mask covering his entire head. Red-collared black outfit with medallion. Wrist-mounted missiles
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Major Bludd (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Australian mercenary in brown military uniform with body armor. Eye patch over right eye and prosthetic mechanical right arm. Armed with arm-mounted missile launcher
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: H.I.S.S. Driver (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra tank operator in dark red uniform with black helmet featuring an enclosed visor. Distinctive padded chest armor. Exclusively operates H.I.S.S. tanks
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Viper Pilot (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra F.A.N.G. gyrocopter pilot in blue flight suit with black helmet and visor. Standard Cobra insignia. Packaged exclusively with the F.A.N.G. vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Baroness (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dark-haired woman in black leather bodysuit with round glasses. Eastern European accent. Armed with various firearms
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Firefly (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra saboteur in gray camouflage uniform with balaclava mask covering entire face. Carries explosive charges, detonators, and a submachine gun. Stealthy and methodical
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Scrap-Iron (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra anti-armor specialist in dark blue and red uniform with black helmet. Carries guided missile launcher and operates shoulder-mounted targeting system
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Storm Shadow (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Ninja assassin in all-white uniform with hood and face mask. Arashikage clan hexagram tattoo on forearm. Armed with katana, nunchucks, and shuriken
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Copperhead (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra swamp fighter in olive and brown wetsuit with distinctive snake-themed helmet and visor. Water Moccasin pilot. Armed with various aquatic weaponry
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Wild Weasel (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra Rattler pilot in dark red flight suit with black flight helmet and opaque visor. Armed with sidearm. Ace combat pilot with bush war experience
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Zartan (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Master of disguise with brown hood and cowl over bare chest. Face paint with distinctive markings. Color-changing skin ability. Armed with bow and arrow
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Stinger Driver (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Stinger jeep operator in dark blue uniform with black helmet. Standard Cobra driver gear. Packaged exclusively with the Night Attack Stinger 4-WD
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Buzzer (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dreadnok biker with long blond hair and sunglasses. Bare-chested with leather vest and torn jeans. Armed with a diamond-toothed chainsaw
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Ripper (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dreadnok biker with wild brown hair and unkempt beard. Wears a torn blue shirt and jeans. Armed with a bayonet-tipped rifle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Torch (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dreadnok biker with brown mohawk hairstyle. Wears sleeveless denim vest revealing tattoos. Armed with an oxy-acetylene cutting torch
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Crimson Guard (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Elite Cobra trooper in crimson red uniform with silver faceplate helmet and black visor. Cobra insignia on chest. Known as 'Siegies'. Armed with rifle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Eels (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra frogman in dark blue and silver wetsuit with full diving mask and rebreather. Fins and underwater demolitions gear. Armed with speargun
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Snow Serpent (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra arctic trooper in white winter uniform with fur-lined hood and goggles. Equipped with snowshoes, backpack, and white assault rifle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Tele-Viper (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra communications specialist in blue and purple uniform with distinctive large helmet featuring antenna and targeting visor. Carries communications equipment
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Tomax (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Crimson Guard commander and identical twin. Slender build in red and blue acrobatic uniform with silver chest armor. Clean-shaven face. CEO of Extensive Enterprises
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Xamot (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Crimson Guard commander and identical twin of Tomax. Same red and blue acrobatic uniform with silver chest armor. Distinguished by facial scar on right cheek
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Lamprey (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra hydrofoil pilot in gray and blue uniform with enclosed helmet and dark visor. Operates the Moray Hydrofoil. Armed with sidearm
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: B.A.T. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra Battle Android Trooper with silver and black robotic body. Exposed chest circuitry with glowing panel. Yellow visor. Interchangeable hand attachments including laser and flamethrower
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Dr. Mindbender (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Bare-chested mad scientist wearing a purple cape and monocle. Black handlebar mustache. Metal suspenders over bare torso. Creator of Serpentor
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Monkeywrench (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dreadnok demolitions expert with wild red hair and bushy beard. Wears sleeveless shirt and armored vest. Armed with multiple grenades and explosive devices
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Viper (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Standard Cobra infantry trooper in blue uniform with red face shield visor and padded body armor. Replaced the original Cobra Trooper. Armed with assault rifle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Zandar (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Zartan's brother and Dreadnok with purple-streaked blond hair. Wears camouflage pants and sleeveless vest. Master of camouflage and illusion like his brother
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Zarana (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Zartan's sister and Dreadnok with pink-streaked hair. Wears torn punk-style clothing. Expert in disguise and undercover operations
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Serpentor (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Genetically engineered Cobra Emperor in gold and green snake-themed armor with cobra hood headpiece. Rides an Air Chariot. Commands with 'This I command!' catchphrase
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: A.V.A.C. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Air Viper Advanced Class pilot in dark blue flight suit with red and gray helmet featuring enclosed visor. Cobra Firebat jet pilot. Packaged with the Terrordrome
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Motor-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra STUN driver in blue and gray uniform with dark helmet and visor. Padded body armor for vehicle operations. Packaged with the STUN vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Strato-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Night Raven pilot in black flight suit with silver helmet and opaque visor. High-altitude flight gear. Packaged with the Night Raven S3P
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Thrasher (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Youngest Dreadnok with wild blond hair and aggressive demeanor. Wears spiked leather accessories and torn clothing. Thunder Machine driver
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Big Boa (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Massive Cobra trainer in dark blue tank top and red boxing gloves. Full-face boxing headgear with cage mask. Muscular build. Hand-to-hand combat instructor
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Croc Master (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra reptile trainer in dark green bodysuit with crocodile-skin armor plating. Full-face helmet with eye slits. Carries whip and is accompanied by trained crocodiles
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Crystal Ball (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra hypnotist in black cape and dark clothing with pale face inspired by Vincent Price. Carries a crystal ball shield used for hypnotic interrogation
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Raptor (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra falconer in brown feathered costume with bird-like helmet and taloned gloves. Eccentric accountant who uses trained birds of prey for reconnaissance
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Techno-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra battlefield technician in purple and gray uniform with distinctive enclosed helmet and targeting visor. Carries repair tools and diagnostic equipment
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Gyro-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Mamba helicopter pilot in gray and blue flight suit with enclosed helmet. Packaged with the Cobra Mamba attack helicopter
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Ice Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Wolf arctic vehicle driver in white and blue winter uniform with enclosed helmet and goggles. Packaged with the Cobra Wolf snow vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sea Slug (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Sea Ray pilot in dark blue and gray wetsuit with enclosed diving helmet. Packaged with the Cobra Sea Ray submarine
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Steam-Roller (Cobra) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Maggot driver in olive and brown uniform with enclosed helmet. Operates the Cobra Maggot multi-terrain vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: W.O.R.M.S. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Weapon Ordnance Rugged Machine Specialist in olive and brown uniform with enclosed helmet. Cobra Maggot gunner. Packaged with Maggot vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Zanzibar (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dreadnok pirate with eyepatch, bandana, and ragged clothing. Wild appearance with missing teeth. Air Skiff pilot and waterway marauder
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Golobulus (ARAH Movie)
data.description: Supreme ruler of Cobra-La with humanoid upper body and serpentine lower body. Organic living armor with tentacle-like appendages. Commands ancient bio-engineered weapons
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Movie

data.name: Nemesis Enforcer (ARAH Movie)
data.description: Golobulus's winged enforcer with massive muscular frame and bat-like wings. Purple-skinned bio-engineered creature. Silent, relentless bodyguard with superhuman strength
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Movie

data.name: Royal Guard (ARAH Movie)
data.description: Cobra-La palace guard with oversized bio-engineered physique. Organic armor with insectoid features. Bred and surgically enhanced for size and strength to protect Golobulus
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: The Movie

data.name: Astro-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra space trooper in silver and purple spacesuit with enclosed helmet and dark visor. Pilots the Stellar Stiletto spacecraft
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Hydro-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra advanced underwater operative in dark blue and green wetsuit with full-face rebreather mask. Specialized in underwater assault and demolitions
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Iron Grenadier (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Destro's elite personal trooper in black and gold uniform with enclosed gold helmet and red visor. Distinctive gold chest armor with Iron Grenadier insignia
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Road Pig (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Massively muscular Dreadnok with mohawk hairstyle and face paint. Wears spiked shoulder pads and torn clothing. Armed with a cinderblock on a stick as an improvised hammer
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Toxo-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra hostile environment trooper in yellow and purple hazmat suit with enclosed helmet and rebreather. Handles toxic and chemical warfare materials
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Voltar (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Iron Grenadier general in black uniform with gold trim and red cape. Wears a gold helmet with face guard. Destro's field commander armed with a staff
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Nullifier (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Iron Grenadier A.G.P. pilot in black and gold flight suit with enclosed helmet. Operates the Anti-Gravity Pod vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Secto-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra B.U.G.G. pilot in insect-themed green and black uniform with bug-eyed helmet. Packaged with the Cobra B.U.G.G. vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Star-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Stellar Stiletto pilot in dark blue and silver spacesuit with enclosed helmet and visor. Packaged with the Stellar Stiletto
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Alley Viper (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra urban assault trooper in distinctive orange and blue camouflage uniform with enclosed face shield. Carries riot shield, grappling hook, and submachine gun
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Frag-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra grenade specialist in teal and gray uniform with enclosed helmet. Carries multiple fragmentation grenades and a grenade launcher
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Gnawgahyde (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dreadnok poacher in animal-skin clothing with fur hat and bushy beard. Accompanied by a wild boar named Clyde. Armed with hunting crossbow
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: H.E.A.T. Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: High Explosive Anti-Tank Viper in red and gray uniform with enclosed helmet. Anti-armor specialist carrying a large bazooka launcher
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra night fighter in dark green and black camouflage uniform with night-vision goggles. Specialist in nighttime stealth operations. Armed with silenced rifle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Annihilator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Iron Grenadier elite trooper in black and gold uniform with enclosed gold helmet. Destro's personal airborne assault force. Armed with assault rifle and jetpack
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Darklon (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Destro's nephew in dark purple and gold uniform with half-face mask. Iron Grenadier operative. Packaged with Darklon's Evader vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Aero-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Condor Z25 pilot in dark blue flight suit with enclosed helmet and opaque visor. Packaged with the Cobra Condor aircraft
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Track Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra H.I.S.S. II driver in blue and gray uniform with enclosed helmet. Operates the upgraded H.I.S.S. II tank. Packaged with the vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Laser-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra laser trooper in bright red and silver uniform with large enclosed helmet and targeting visor. Armed with directed-energy laser rifle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Metal-Head (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Iron Grenadier anti-tank specialist covered in missiles and ordnance. Wears a metal helmet with targeting visor. Walking arsenal for Destro's forces
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Night-Creeper (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Cobra techno-ninja mercenary in purple and black uniform with enclosed mask and night-vision visor. Blends high-tech gadgetry with traditional ninja weapons
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Range-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra wilderness trooper in green and brown camouflage with ghillie suit elements and bush hat. Armed with assault rifle and survival gear
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Rock-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra mountain trooper in gray and orange uniform with climbing harness and enclosed helmet. Alpine warfare specialist with grappling equipment
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: S.A.W.-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Special Assault Weapons Viper in dark blue uniform with enclosed helmet and ammo belts. Carries a massive heavy machine gun and backpack ammunition feed
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Overlord (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Iron Grenadier commander in black and gold uniform with cape and enclosed helmet. Packaged with the Dictator vehicle. Destro's senior field officer
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Decimator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Iron Grenadier Razorback driver in black and gold uniform with enclosed helmet. Packaged with the Iron Grenadier Razorback vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Vapor (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Hammerhead pilot in blue and gray flight suit with enclosed helmet. Packaged with the Cobra Hammerhead sea/air vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Crimson Guard Immortal (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Elite Crimson Guard trooper in updated crimson red uniform with silver face shield and black visor. Advanced version of the original Crimson Guard with improved armor
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Desert Scorpion (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra desert trooper in tan and brown desert camouflage uniform with head wrap and goggles. Desert warfare specialist armed with assault rifle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Incinerators (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra flamethrower trooper in red and yellow uniform with heat-resistant suit and enclosed helmet. Carries a backpack-fed flamethrower
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cesspool (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Eco-Warriors Cobra operative in green and purple hazmat-style suit. Half of face scarred and disfigured from industrial accident. Former chemical company CEO turned eco-villain
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sludge Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra toxic waste operative in green and yellow hazmat suit with enclosed helmet. Eco-Warriors sub-line. Color-change feature reacting to water temperature
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Overkill (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Android B.A.T. commander with exposed robotic face and mechanical body. Half-human, half-robot appearance with visible circuitry. Commands Cobra's Battle Android Troopers
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (DIC)

data.name: Red Star (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Oktober Guard operative in olive green Soviet military uniform with fur hat and red star insignia. Armed with AK-47 assault rifle. First Soviet character in the ARAH toyline
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Dice (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Ninja Force operative in red and black ninja outfit with face mask. Specialist in pressure points and choke holds. Partner to Slice
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Slice (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Ninja Force swordsman in dark blue and silver ninja outfit with face mask. Arashikage clan renegade and Cobra's supreme swordsman. Partner to Dice
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Flak-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra anti-aircraft trooper in blue and gray uniform with enclosed helmet. Armed with shoulder-mounted anti-aircraft missile launcher
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Headman (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Drug kingpin in white suit and fedora hat with gold chain. Leader of the Headhunters criminal organization. DEF sub-line. Cobra-allied organized crime boss
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Headhunter (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Headman's enforcement thug in dark suit with body armor and balaclava. DEF sub-line. Generic street-level criminal operative
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Toxo-Zombie (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra toxic waste mutant with grotesque decayed appearance. Green and purple discolored skin. Eco-Warriors sub-line with color-change gimmick reacting to water temperature
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Air Devil (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Air Commandos operative in red and black uniform with paraglider wing pack. Air assault trooper equipped for low-altitude aerial insertion
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Ninja Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Generic Cobra ninja trooper in black ninja outfit with face mask and red accents. Mail-in exclusive figure. Armed with traditional ninja weapons
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Big Bear (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Oktober Guard operative in olive green uniform with fur-lined vest and ushanka hat. Large, stocky build. Only Oktober Guard member released as a carded figure
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Creeper Leader (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Commander of the Night Creeper techno-ninja clan in dark purple and gold uniform with ornate face mask. Carries high-tech ninja weapons and surveillance equipment
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Crimson Guard Commander (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Elite Crimson Guard officer in crimson red uniform with gold trim and updated face shield. Battle Corps sub-line. Commands Crimson Guard units
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Headhunter Stormtrooper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Elite Headhunter enforcer in dark blue uniform with body armor, helmet, and face shield. Upgraded version of the standard Headhunter thug
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Bio-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Genetically enhanced undersea monster with green and purple mutated body. Created by Dr. Mindbender. Mega Marines sub-line with moldable bio-armor accessory
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cyber-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra cyborg trooper in purple and silver uniform with cybernetic enhancements. Mega Marines sub-line with moldable bio-armor accessory
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Mega-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Mega-Monster trainer in dark blue and gray uniform with enclosed helmet. Mega Marines sub-line with moldable bio-armor accessory
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Monstro-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra bio-genetic hunter in green and black mutated armor. Mega Marines sub-line with moldable bio-armor accessory. Monstrous appearance
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra B.A.A.T. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Battle Armored Android Trooper in silver and blue space armor. Armored version of the B.A.T. designed for space operations. Star Brigade sub-line
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Blackstar (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Star Brigade operative in black and silver space suit with enclosed helmet. Space warfare specialist equipped for orbital combat
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Lobotomaxx (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Alien creature from the Lunartix Empire with oversized brain-like head and grotesque features. Green and purple skin. Star Brigade sub-line. Allied with Cobra
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Predacon (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Alien creature from the Lunartix Empire with reptilian features and armored body. Star Brigade sub-line. Allied with Cobra against Earth forces
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Carcass (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Alien creature from the Lunartix Empire with decayed, skeletal appearance. Star Brigade sub-line. Allied with Cobra against Earth forces
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Heli-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra helicopter assault trooper in blue and gray flight suit with enclosed helmet. Packaged with the Cobra Liquidator vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Nitro-Viper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Detonator driver in dark blue and red uniform with enclosed helmet. Packaged with the Cobra Detonator vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Wild Boar (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Iron Grenadier Razorback gunner in black and gold uniform with enclosed helmet. Packaged with the Iron Grenadier Razorback vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Ferret (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Iron Grenadier recon operative in black and gold uniform with enclosed helmet and surveillance gear. Packaged with Iron Grenadier vehicle
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Ghostrider (Cobra) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Cobra Phantom X-19 pilot in dark blue and silver flight suit with enclosed helmet. Packaged with the Cobra Phantom X-19 stealth aircraft
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero
